query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Glib', 'Readily fluent, often thoughtlessly or insincerely so', 'Scholars noted a striking glib between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glimmer', 'To shine with a faint light', 'The author hoped the new policy would glimmer tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glimpse', 'To see or view briefly or incompletely', 'The author hoped the new policy would glimpse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gloat', 'To exhibit a conspicuous sense of self-satisfaction', 'Over time, the community learned to gloat its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Globose', 'Having a globular form', 'What seemed globose at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Globular', 'Roughly spherical in shape', 'Her globular became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glorious', 'Attributes, qualities, or acts that are worthy of glory', 'The passage presents a glorious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glut', 'To fill to capacity, to satisfy all requirement or demand', 'The author hoped the new policy would glut tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glutinous', 'Glue-like, sticky, viscid', 'What seemed glutinous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Glutton', 'A person who eats and drinks excessively or voraciously', 'Her glutton became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gluttonous', 'Given to excessive eating, prone to overeating', 'The author hoped the new policy would gluttonous tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gluttony', 'The vice of eating to excess', 'Critics argued that the plan might gluttony the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gnarl', 'Knotty and misshapen', 'The essay highlights the gnarl of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gnash', 'To grind one''s teeth in pain or in anger', 'Critics argued that the plan might gnash the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Goad', 'To prick or drive with, or as if with, a goad, prod', 'Her goad became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gordian', 'Resembling the gordian knot in intricacy', 'Her gordian became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gosl', 'A young goose', 'The essay highlights the gosl of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gossamer', 'A fine, filmy cobweb seen on grass or floating in the air', 'Her gossamer became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gothic', 'A style of architecture from the mid-12th century', 'The essay highlights the gothic of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gouge', 'To scoop out or turn with or as if with a gouge', 'Her gouge became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gourd', 'The dried shell of a hard fruit used for utensils', 'Scholars noted a striking gourd between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gourmand', 'A person who is fond of good eating', 'Her gourmand became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Graceless', 'Without grace', 'Her graceless became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gradation', 'A sequence of gradual, successive stages', 'The essay highlights the gradation of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gradient', 'An inclined surface, grade, ramp', 'The passage presents a gradient portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Granary', 'A storage facility for grain or sometimes animal feed', 'Scholars noted a striking granary between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grandeur', 'The state of being grand or splendid, magnificence', 'Scholars noted a striking grandeur between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grandiloquence', 'Lofty, pompous or bombastic speech or writing', 'The essay highlights the grandiloquence of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grandiloquent', 'Pompous or extravagant in language, style, or manner', 'What seemed grandiloquent at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grandiose', 'Large and impressive, in size, scope or extent', 'Her grandiose became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grantee', 'The person to whom something is granted', 'Over time, the community learned to grantee its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grantor', 'A person who grants something', 'The essay highlights the grantor of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Granular', 'Consisting of, or resembling, granules or grains', 'Scholars noted a striking granular between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Granulate', 'To segment into tiny grains or particles', 'Over time, the community learned to granulate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Granule', 'A tiny grain, a small particle', 'The essay highlights the granule of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grapple', 'Wrestle, physically or mentally', 'The essay highlights the grapple of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grate', 'To shred things, usually food, by rubbing across a grater', 'Over time, the community learned to grate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gratification', 'The act of pleasing the mind, the taste, or the appetite', 'Scholars noted a striking gratification between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gratify', 'To give pleasure by satisfying desires, to indulge', 'The author hoped the new policy would gratify tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gratis', 'Free, without charge', 'Scholars noted a striking gratis between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gratuitous', 'Uncalled for; lacking good reason; unwarranted', 'The reviewer described the tone as gratuitous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gratuity', 'A reward, or payment provided freely, without obligation', 'The essay highlights the gratuity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gregarious', 'Sociable and enjoying the company of others', '“He was a gregarious person who made friends easily.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grenadier', 'A type of soldier, originally one who threw grenades', 'Her grenadier became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grievance', 'Something which causes grief', 'Her grievance became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grievous', 'Causing grief, pain or sorrow', 'The passage presents a grievous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grimace', 'To distort one''s face, to make faces', 'The author hoped the new policy would grimace tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grindstone', 'An abrasive wheel for sharpening, polishing or grinding', 'Scholars noted a striking grindstone between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Grisly', 'Horrifyingly repellent, terrifying, gruesome', 'She spoke grisly, leaving little doubt about her position.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Gristle', 'Cartilage, especially in meats', 'Scholars noted a striking gristle between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
